title: SQLancer algebra.select' undefined 2
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id Int32, name String, age Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE t2 (ref_id Int32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref_id;
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (1, 'First entry'), (2, 'Second entry'), (NULL, 'Null reference');
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t1 WHERE age IS NULL) = 0;
key_bug_features: Invalid use of 'is null' in select statement
